rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
Ensure assumptions and guarantees refer to visible ports in valid scopes; avoid subcomponent paths in type annexes.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Declare constants and equations with correct AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
Assign only to existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only dependencies.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and => for implication.
Use const, eq, and gua keywords with proper type annotations in AGREE annex blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts.
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: model repair and validator-driven minimal repair patterns
